## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion between GrowthX and Menlo Ventures to explore GrowthX's business model, technology, and potential for investment.](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has evolved from a service-based model to a tech-enabled content marketing platform with AI-driven workflows and human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [The company has achieved $11M run rate in 84 weeks, with a strong customer base including Augment, Abnormal Security, and RAMP](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [GrowthX is focused on proving their ability to scale and automate processes, aiming to transition from a services-heavy model to a higher-margin SaaS offering](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Menlo Ventures expressed interest but seeks to validate GrowthX's potential to become a billion-dollar ARR company](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Business Model and Evolution

  - [Started as a service-based content marketing company, now transitioning to a tech-enabled platform](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Implemented an 8-week strategy sprint model ($20k-$30k) with 100% conversion to 12-month contracts](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Current focus on content marketing with plans to expand into other marketing functions](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Aiming to reduce human involvement and increase automation over time](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)

### Technology and Platform

  - [Developed a three-layer system:](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
    1.  Vertical software for content marketing (client-facing)
    2.  General-purpose AI workflow engine
    3.  Task assignment layer for human involvement
  - [Runtime layer showing over 3 million workflow activities in the last 120 days](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
  - [Custom workflows and AI agents for research, drafting, fact-checking, and more](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)

### Customer Base and Case Studies

  - [Notable clients: Augment ($50k/month), Abnormal Security, RAMP, Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Success story: Augment - managed with minimal involvement from leadership, showing scalability](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Unique case: Surge AI - full marketing department management as a strategic partnership](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)

### Go-to-Market Strategy and Pipeline

  - [Currently at $8 million in open pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Growth primarily through word-of-mouth and community building](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Investing in events (CMO breakfasts, virtual workshops) and building AILAGrowth community](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [Potential deals with G2, HighSpot, GuidePoint, DataRobot, and others](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)

### Challenges and Improvements

  - [Early issues with customer churn due to misaligned expectations and wrong ICP](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=3022.0)
  - [Refined ICP and service offerings to focus on specific content marketing needs](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Improved deployment model with strategists and managing directors](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)

### Competitive Advantage and Differentiation

  - [Expertise from Marcel's CMO background combined with Daniel's product and tech experience](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Proprietary AI workflow engine and content OS](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Ability to handle complex, high-quality content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Menlo to introduce GrowthX to their CMO (Tiffany) and Diane for a product demo](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=3745.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide customer references, specifically from Augment and Abnormal Security](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=3774.0)
  - [Menlo to introduce GrowthX to Obsidian Securities as a potential client](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=3555.0)
  - [Menlo partners to discuss internally and determine next steps for potential investment](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=3743.0)
  - [GrowthX to share more details on their pipeline and growth projections](https://fathom.video/share/cNyGtcdts24vPVP1ra7UihsqbXRsoVLf?tab=summary&timestamp=3611.0)
